suites.name: GhostSSH Role Matching
suites.description: Validates SSH access rules, permission evaluation based on public keys, expired sessions, and role level mapping.

suites.name: ICT Knowledge Engine Retrieval
suites.description: Evaluates vector database retrieval, search grounding, documentation grounding, and correct procedures on VPN, LDAP, and VMs.

suites.name: Campus Compass Source-Grounded Answers
suites.description: Checks conversational groundness for students regarding course prerequisites, campus facilities, medical center hours, and grading policies.

cases.name: Allow DevOps SSH access with valid public key
cases.input:
Access Request:
User: sally_devops
Key: ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAI... / devops-prod
Gateway: prod-db-01
Token_Validity: valid
cases.expectedOutput: Approved access. Role mapped to devops-admin with full shell permissions.
cases.requiredEvidence: sally_devops belongs to the active active-devops-group database record.
cases.notes: Primary verification path for active directory sync.

cases.name: Reject intern access to secure database cluster
cases.input:
Access Request:
User: bob_intern
Key: ssh-rsa AAAAB3NzaC1yc... / intern-finance
Gateway: prod-db-01
Token_Validity: valid
cases.expectedOutput: Access Denied. Reason: Insufficient permissions for database cluster gateway.
cases.requiredEvidence: bob_intern restricted from prod cluster databases due to internship policy Section 4.
cases.notes: Crucial for compliance compliance audit requirements.

cases.name: Grant read-only security auditor role on bastion host
cases.input:
Access Request:
User: alice_auditor
Key: ssh-ed25519 AAAAC1... / audit-global
Gateway: bastion-01
Token_Validity: valid
cases.expectedOutput: Approved access. Role mapped to security-auditor-readonly. Commands are logged to firewall audit log.
cases.requiredEvidence: alice_auditor has audit clearance certificate G-992 and audit role.

cases.name: Reject DevOps access due to expired session token
cases.input:
Access Request:
User: sally_devops
Key: ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC... / devops-prod
Gateway: prod-db-01
Token_Validity: expired
cases.expectedOutput: Access Denied. Reason: Token has expired. Please run kinit to refresh keys.
cases.requiredEvidence: Session token expired error code ERR_AUTH_EXP.

cases.name: Retrieve Mac VPN configuration settings
cases.input: How do I configure the WireGuard VPN client on MacOS Sequoia for high-security zones?
cases.expectedOutput: Set Server endpoint to wg.sec.corp.com:51820, Protocol UDP, DNS to 10.0.80.5, and import corporate-private.conf key profile.
cases.requiredEvidence: wg.sec.corp.com:51820 with private configuration profile is mandatory.

cases.name: Lookup LDAP password requirements
cases.input: What is the password dynamic requirement and reset rotation period for central LDAP?
cases.expectedOutput: Minimum 16 characters, must include numbers, special characters, mixed case, and reset mandatory every 90 days.
cases.requiredEvidence: Reset mandatory every 90 days and minimum length of 16 characters.

cases.name: Server room temperature thresholds
cases.input: What are the red and amber alerts for Server Room 2B thermal guidelines?
cases.expectedOutput: Amber alert triggers at 25°C, Red alert/automatic power-down of dev rack initiated at 30°C.
cases.requiredEvidence: Amber Alert 25C, Red Alert 30C with system shutdowns.

cases.name: Find Virtual Machine decommission steps
cases.input: List the exact steps to retire an inactive VMware cluster VM in our registry.
cases.expectedOutput: 1. Backup snapshot. 2. Remove DNS records. 3. Delete VM storage volume. 4. Release static IP allocation. 5. Archive logs.
cases.requiredEvidence: Required actions: Snapshot backups, DNS cleanup, drive deletion, static IP releasing, and log archival.

cases.name: Quantum Physics prerequisites checklist
cases.input: What are the required prerequisites to enroll in Advanced Quantum Mechanics (PHY-301)?
cases.expectedOutput: Must complete Intro Classical Mechanics (PHY-201) and Multi-variable Calculus (MAT-203), both with a letter grade of C- or better.
cases.requiredEvidence: PHY-201 and MAT-203 with minimum grade of C- are essential.

cases.name: Parking permits and fees
cases.input: Where can I buy a student parking permit, and what is its price for a single semester?
cases.expectedOutput: Buy online on student portal or at Campus Police desk (Building 1A). Single semester permit costs $180, valid in Lot G, R, and S.
cases.requiredEvidence: Online student portal or Building 1A, costing $180 per semester.

cases.name: Weekend Medical Center open hours
cases.input: What are the operating hours for the Campus Medical Center on Saturday and Sunday?
cases.expectedOutput: Saturday open from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM for urgent care only. Sunday closed.
cases.requiredEvidence: Saturday 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM (urgent care), Sunday closed.

cases.name: Grade Appeal process time constraints
cases.input: What is the deadline and process of filing a Grade Appeal for a computer science course?
cases.expectedOutput: Must submit a formal appeal package using Grade-Appeal-Form within 14 calendar days of final grades release, first presenting it to the instructing professor.
cases.requiredEvidence: 14 calendar days of final grades release and submission of Grade-Appeal-Form.

sources.title: Active Directory User Registry SecOps Gateway
sources.excerpt: sally_devops holds active credentials for production bastions and cluster endpoints under permission groups: active-devops-group.

sources.title: SecOps Intern Security Guidelines v2.4
sources.excerpt: Section 4: Interns are restricted from direct root shell access to production databases. Mapped to staging-readonly-shell if requested.

sources.title: Auditing Clearence and Gateway Privileges Guide
sources.excerpt: Staff with active G-992 certificate must be routed to security-auditor-readonly shell on all main ingress bastion bastions.

sources.title: SSO Session Lifecycle Policy
sources.excerpt: Whenever gateway encounters state "expired", it triggers ERR_AUTH_EXP and redirects terminal terminal session back to Kerberos authenticate.

sources.title: Sec.Corp VPN Internal Setup Instructions
sources.excerpt: Mac WireGuard configurations must point to dns 10.0.80.5, remote endpoint: wg.sec.corp.com:51820. Profile corporate-private.conf must be used.

sources.title: Global Security Standard ICT-SEC-201
sources.excerpt: Central AD / LDAP accounts must rotate passwords every 90 days. Complexity requires 16 characters minimum, mixing case, digits, and specials.

sources.title: Datacenter climate parameters (SR-2B)
sources.excerpt: Room 2B guidelines: standard ranges (18-22°C). Amber thermal alert at 25°C. Critical Red warning at 30°C demands emergency VM migrations and dev-rack downing.

sources.title: Asset Lifecycle Playbook: Decommissioning
sources.excerpt: Step-by-step decommission process: snapshot backup VM -> de-register DNS A-records -> purge VMFS folders -> return static ip range to pool -> logs zipped and shipped.

sources.title: Course Catalog 2025-2026 Department of Physics
sources.excerpt: PHY-301 Advanced Quantum Mechanics: prerequisites: PHY-201 (Classical Mech) & MAT-203 (Multi Calc) passed with grade C- or above.

sources.title: Campus Parking Services Rules & Costs
sources.excerpt: Parking passes can be bought at Parking office (Bld 1A) or portal. Cost of standard semester-long student coupon is $180 (renewed in Fall/Spring). Valid in Yellow lots (G, R, S).

sources.title: Campus Health and Recreation Timetable
sources.excerpt: Medical services: Mon-Fri 8am-7pm. Sat 9am-1pm (strictly walk-in Urgent Care). Sun closed. For emergency dial 911 or call Campus Patrol.

sources.title: Academic Grievance Statutes Sec 7.2
sources.excerpt: Students wishing to dispute a grade must file the official Grade-Appeal-Form. Deadline to present to advisor & professor is exactly 14 calendar days from grade publication.

runs.notes: Initial production baseline audit with older system integration logic.
Hotfix applied to secure token handler and error feedback pipelines.
Baseline release using hybrid vector retrieval.
Retrieval vector indexing update deployment with unoptimized query parser.
Completed evaluation sweep of student bot RAG framework with default system prompt configuration.
Regression test run on student gateway helper. Prompts refactored for brevity, causing RAG source grounding mismatch.

regressions.description: Case status regressed from PASS (100) to FAIL (45). Model did not output the 16 character minimum or 90 day rotation period, resulting in evidence loss.
Latency spiked by 160% (from 920ms to 2400ms), breaching the 1000ms service level agreement threshold.
Evidence Grounding Failure: "evidenceMatched" changed from true to false. The RAG engine did not fetch or output the necessary reference sources (PHY-201, MAT-203) for course registration.
Performance Alert: Response latency rose from 650ms to 1530ms (A 135% speed degradation).
State Downgrade: Status regressed from PARTIAL to FAIL (Score dropped from 85 to 38).
State Downgrade: Status regressed from PASS to PARTIAL (Score dropped from 100 to 55).
